name: Shandong Nanshan Aluminium Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Nanshan Aluminium Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells aluminum profiles worldwide. It offers construction and industrial profile series of products, such as alumina, electrolytic aluminum, aluminum, aluminum foils, aviation materials, other terminal products that are used in aerospace, ships, trains, electric power, automobile, container, etc. The company was formerly known as Shandong Nanshan Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shandong Nanshan Aluminium Co., Ltd. in March 2006. Shandong Nanshan Aluminium Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Longkou, China.
